name: Date or Raisin Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the bran cereal and flour; stir in baking powder and sugar.
3. Add raisins and walnuts; mix well with an egg and oil.
4. Pour into greased muffin tins.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely before removing from the pan.
